findings.description: The prominent Novo Nordisk Apis bull illustration (organizational emblem) on the cover/title page is missing from the HTML rendering.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 features a large line-drawn Apis bull (the Novo Nordisk organizational mark) occupying approximately the right third of the title slide. The HTML cover section renders only the title text, subtitle, author, and date with no bull illustration present.

findings.description: The number '170' appears prominently on PDF page 2 (the 'Novo Nordisk at a glance' slide) as a standalone statistic — likely representing the number of countries where products are available/marketed. This data point is entirely absent from the HTML.
findings.evidence: PDF page 2 raw text includes '170' twice — once standalone and once adjacent to '80 Affiliates in countries', suggesting it is a distinct metric (e.g., '170 countries' for product reach vs. '80 countries with affiliates'). The HTML has no mention of '170' anywhere.
